final:
module RefModule(
    input branch,
    input branchIf,
    input brx,
    input z,
    input n,
    output result
  wire temp1_(brx & branchIf & n) | (~brx & branchIf & z) = (brx & branchIf & n) | (~brx & branchIf & z);
  wire temp2_branch = branch;
  assign result = temp1_(brx & branchIf & n) | (~brx & branchIf & z) | temp2_branch;
endmodule
